signals.headline: SOL Surges 10% Over Five Days to Three-Week High | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SOL Surges 10% Over Five Days to Three-Week High | YES | HIGH confidence**

SOL climbed 10% over five days, reaching a three-week high on Friday (April 18)[2]. This move followed the US-Iran ceasefire extension announcement, which reduced risk-off sentiment across crypto markets[2]. Futures open interest jumped 20% in under a week, rising from $3.5 billion to $4.2 billion[2].

Solana processed 25.3 billion transactions in Q1 2026, significantly outpacing Ethereum's 200 million transactions[3]. signals.headline: Ethereum Technical Setup: Triple-Bottom Formation Near $2,500 | YES | MEDIUM confidence**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Technical Setup: Triple-Bottom Formation Near $2,500 | YES | MEDIUM confidence**

Ethereum shows a "triple-bottom" formation around $2,500, suggesting potential bullish setup toward $3,000[4]. ETH futures open interest surged 12% to $14.25 billion[4], indicating institutional confidence in a potential rebound.
